body:
## Summary
- add an E2E mock purchase action counter/delay path for Remove Ads and Pro Lifetime runtime coverage
- wire the Pro paywall to default runtime options so E2E web can use the mock provider without changing production defaults
- add Playwright coverage proving rapid double activation on PremiumBanner and ProPaywall buy/restore paths dispatches one mocked store call

## Validation
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test scripts/monetization.test.js tests/v1-1-pro-iap.test.js --test-name-pattern 'Remove Ads|PremiumBanner|ProPaywall|in-flight|purchaseActionInFlightRef|buy|restore'`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run validate:content`
- `git diff --check origin/main..HEAD`
- `CI=1 EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run build:web:export -- --max-workers 2`
- `E2E_PORT=4175 CI=1 EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run test:e2e -- tests/e2e/purchase-inflight-guard.spec.ts --workers=1`
title: test: cover purchase in-flight runtime guards
